text:
is a toyline collaboration between the Hone Hone Zaurus candy plastic model toyline and Evangelion. The toyline was developed by Kabaya. The collaboration started in 2017 and received a second series in 2019. https://www.eva-info.jp/7468 It also contains illustrations by . The figures have color variations and also changes the design in order to make it looks like bones from dinossaurs. The figures are around 10cm and can be changed since they are fairly modular, creating your own creature. There are exclusive itens limited to events and special packages like the Hone Bazooka [Glow in the Dark] White Ver.] in the WF2018 Winter event. https://www.eva-info.jp/3806 

Project 01 (2017)

The box containing 8 figures (4 Normal + 4 Color Variants) comes with an extra Longinus Hone (Bloody Clear Ver.) + holding hands (left and right) set.
